name: The Farstriders
inspire: Immediately after a friendly fighter's second Attack in the same phase and a different weapon was picked for those Attacks, Inspire that fighter.

reactions.name: Vanguard
reactions.trigger: Use this immediately after an Inspired vulnerable friendly fighter in enemy territory used a Core ability.
reactions.rulesText:
Pick one:

• Uninspire and heal that fighter. For the rest of the battle round, this fighter cannot be healed or Inspired.

• Pick an enemy fighter within 3 hexes of this fighter and roll a number of Attack dice equal to the battle round. On a roll of {icon:fury} or {icon:crit}, inflict 1 damage on that fighter.

abilities.name: Ranger Elite
abilities.flavorText: To deliver the killing blow, first a hunter must find the right position…
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after your Action step. Push each friendly fighter a number of hexes equal to the battle round. Those pushes must end in enemy territory. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Forward the Vanguard!
abilities.flavorText: To fight in the Vanguard Chamber demands a courageous and adventurous spirit indeed.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after your Action step. Pick a friendly fighter that is not in enemy territory and not adjacent to any enemy fighters. That friendly fighter can Move. You can only use this ability once per game.

abilities.name: Behind Enemy Lines
abilities.flavorText: Like all Vanguard warriors, the Farstriders are well used to fighting in hostile conditions and without support.
abilities.rulesText: Use this immediately after your Action step. Pick a damaged friendly fighter in enemy territory. Give that fighter a Guard token. You can only use this ability once per game.
